chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1600 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7733/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.7734/2021 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA No.7735/2021 (Stay) 09-11-2021 Mr. Shamsuddin Rajper, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2, 3, 4 & 5. It appears that the grievance of the Petitioner is in respect of matter relating to his terms and conditions of service, and therefore, his remedy lies before the Service Tribunal. Accordingly, the Petition is not maintainable and is hereby dismissed with pending applications, whereas, the Petitioner may seek appropriate remedy before the Service Tribunal in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
